ability: 每局游戏限一次，在夜晚时，你可以选择跳过当晚剩余的夜晚行动。（当晚之后的行动不会被唤醒/进行，直接进入白天）
otherNightReminder: Ask if they want to use their ability, if the ability is used place the *NO ABILIY* reminder next to them, skip the rest of the night phase. :reminder:
flavor: I'm late, I'm late, for a very important date! No time to say “Hello, Good Bye” I'm late, I'm late, I'm late!
